name: TWINS ?! Jeno & Jisung
description:
🍬 | It was a lazy afternoon with you and your boyfriend. All you wanted to do was rest and enjoy your weekend before going back to work . . . until everything went downhill. Your boyfriend, Jisung, never told you he was a twin. To make matters worse, they're identical twins. You can hardly tell them apart.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it! :))
